scores.notes: Excellent response. Uses self.unit.get_container() instead of event.workload in the pebble_ready handler (delegating to _reconfigure()), which is slightly different from the gold standard but equally valid and actually more idiomatic for multi-handler reuse. All required elements present: config command via self.config.get(), DB env vars from relation.data[relation.app], HTTP health check with url/level/on-check-failure. Uses override:replace, add_layer with combine=True, and replan(). Adds extra correct details (period, timeout, threshold in checks; status management; additional event handlers) that go beyond the gold standard but are all factually correct ops/pebble APIs.
